headline: Morgan Stanley Reiterates Buy Rating on Costco Wholesale (COST) Stock
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is one of the Best Big Company Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 29, Simeon Gutman from Morgan Stanley reiterated a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock with a price objective of $1,130.00. The analyst’s rating is backed by several factors that are associated with Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST)’s structural strengths and […]

headline: Costco Tariff Refund Plan Links Trade Ruling To Member Value And Valuation
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) is preparing to file for tariff refunds following a Supreme Court ruling. The company plans to return those tariff refunds directly to members, creating a rare link between U.S. trade policy and shopper wallets. CEO Ron Vachris has confirmed the intent to pass any eligible refunds back to customers. This refund process stems from changes in how tariffs are treated under U.S. law, with operational and financial implications for Costco. Costco Wholesale runs a...

headline: QQQ vs VGT: Which Tech ETF Is Better?
summary: Investors looking for the best tech ETF might be disappointed to discover that a lot of the Invesco QQQ ETF's portfolio isn't actually tech.
